summary: Vite 7 base64-encodes manual <link rel=modulepreload> href for JSX files
rule: Never add manual modulepreload hints in index.html; let Vite generate them

summary: medicine_logs table missing status and treatment_plan_id columns (schema drift)
Schema documentation SCHEMAS.md was ~1.5 years out of date; requires regular audits
Fixed 3 console errors: modulepreload MIME issue, schema drift in medicine_logs queries
StockCard UX: hide consumed entries and system adjustments in collapsible sections
Use parseLocalDate() instead of new Date() for timezone-aware parsing (R-020)
Array.filter() chained 3x should be single Array.reduce() for performance
Dashboard first-load performance optimization: removed vendor-pdf from modulepreload (172KB gzip), eliminated 2 Supabase queries, cached getCurrentUser
HAR on localhost inflates query counts 2-3x vs production (StrictMode doubles effects)
rule: Always measure performance on production, not localhost

summary: Barrel exports break lazy loading: @shared/services/index.js pulls entire dependency chain into main bundle
Vite manualChunks creates separate chunks but modulepreload links negate lazy loading benefits
PDF report generation: clinical consultation format with patient demographics, medications, adherence data
